Article Title: Anil Kumble: Sanju Samson is a combination of Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma
Article Text:
Sanju Samson (PTI Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

India’s T20 World Cup win sparks celebrations | Rajeev Shukla, Tharoor & others react

Poll Do you believe Sanju Samson can maintain this level of performance in future tournaments? Yes, he's proved himself Maybe, but consistency is key

ALSO READ:

NEW DELHI: When Sanju Samson walked out to open midway through the tournament, few could have predicted that he would end up scripting one of the most remarkable turnarounds in ICC Men's T20 World Cup history. But for India spin legend Anil Kumble , Samson’s performances in the knockout stages reflected a rare blend of two of India’s greatest modern batters — Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma .After spending the first half of the tournament on the bench, Samson was drafted into the XI as an opener ahead of the decisive Super 8 clash against the West Indies. The Kerala batter responded with an unbeaten 97 in what was effectively a virtual knockout in Kolkata, before producing back-to-back 89s in the semi-final and the final to power India’s title-winning run.The explosive streak saw Samson break several records, including the highest individual score in a T20 World Cup final. He also joined Kohli as the only Indians to score fifties in both the semi-final and final of the same World Cup edition, while finishing with a staggering 321 runs in just five innings — the most by an Indian in a single edition of the tournament.For Kumble, the numbers told only part of the story.“If you look at the previous World Cup in 2024, it had Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma.Both are great players, very difficult to replace them,” Kumble said on ESPNcricinfo. “I think Samson is a combination of Kohli and Rohit, in a sense.”Kumble explained that Samson displayed Kohli’s calculated control when the situation demanded patience, while also unleashing Rohit-like aggression when the momentum needed to shift.“When it required a little bit of Kohli, where you just plan and ensure that you don’t lose wickets,” he said. “And then whenever you need to accelerate in the powerplay, you want to take on the bowlers — like Rohit.”Even while anchoring the innings, Samson did not compromise on his natural flair. As India became the first team to smash 100 sixes in a single World Cup edition, Samson accounted for 24 of them — the most by any batter in the tournament.
Article Summary: Anil Kumble believes Sanju Samson is a combination of Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma. Samson scored 321 runs in five innings, the most by an Indian in a single World Cup. The Kerala batter scored the highest individual score in a T20 World Cup final.

Article Title: Gautam Gambhir on why the team backed Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson: ‘Trust & faith, not hope’
Article Text:
India head coach Gautam Gambhir with captain Suryakumar Yadav. (Pic credit: BCCI)

Proud families celebrate India’s World Cup heroes | SKY, Abhishek & Axar’s loved ones react





AHMEDABAD: Gautam Gambhir said he picked India’s T20 side on “trust and faith” and backed Sanju Samson and Abhishek Sharma despite poor form. The opening duo played important roles in the final. Maybe struggling ‘mystery spinner’ Varun Chakravarthy, who did not come good, can also be added to the list.Before the final, Abhishek had put together just 89 runs in seven matches at 12.71, including three ducks.However, the left-hander rediscovered his destructive touch in the final, smashing an 18-ball half-century, the fastest of this World Cup.Gambhir also showed faith in Samson, recalling him even though the ’keeper-batter had scored just 46 runs in a fivematch T20I series against the Kiwis a week before the World Cup.Samson hit three matchwinning half-centuries on the trot, first the 50-ball 97 not out against West Indies at the Eden Gardens in Kolkata and then knocks of 89 off 42 balls in the semis against England and 89 off 46 balls in the final.“I think you pick the team on trust and faith. You don’t pick on hope. When you pick someone on trust and faith, you don’t lose that trust and faith after four, five games,” he said.Gambhir said Samson was given a break for a few matches. “It was a tactical change,” the coach said. “The captain and I never felt Sanju was out of form. We felt that after the NZ series, he needed a break.“Sometimes, it’s good to give someone a break. You want to get away from the pressure, clear your head and come back. The talent that Sanju has and the way he was batting in the nets, there was no doubt he’d deliver.” added Gambhir.
Article Summary: Gautam Gambhir says he picked India’s T20 side on ‘trust and faith’ and backed Sanju Samson and Abhishek Sharma despite poor form. Samson hit three matchwinning half-centuries on the trot, first the 50-ball 97 not out against West Indies.

Article Title: Ishan Kishan dedicates T20 World Cup triumph to late cousin
Article Text:
Ishan Kishan (ANI Photo)

India’s T20 World Cup win sparks celebrations | Rajeev Shukla, Tharoor & others react





AHMEDABAD: For Ishan Kishan , India’s World Cup victory New Zealand was about far more than celebrations. The explosive lefthander, who smashed 54 off 25 balls in the final, revealed that he had lost his cousin in a car accident a day before the final.“I was not planning to say this, but I lost my cousin yesterday (Saturday) in a car accident. I got to know during the practice session,” Kishan said, “She always wanted me to score big runs. Today was a big day and I thought the best thing I could do was score runs for her. That’s why I looked up after reaching my fifty — it was for my sister.”“I wasn’t feeling well mentally, but Hardik-bhai. He told me it wouldn’t be easy but said that we have to lift each other for the team’s cause,” Kishan said, “I had that anger to perform.Kishan said he had changed his mindset over the past year by focusing only on things within his control. “I’ve stopped overthinking,” he admitted.
Article Summary: Ishan Kishan reveals he lost his cousin in a car accident a day before the final. The explosive lefthander smashed 54 off 25 balls in the final of the T20 World Cup. “I wasn’t feeling well mentally, but Hardik-bhai. He told me it wouldn't be easy but said that we have to lift each other for the team’s cause,” he said.

Article Title: 'Indian cricket in golden phase': BCCI after T20 World Cup 2026 triumph
Article Text:
BCCI Photo

Ahmedabad erupts as Team India arrive at hotel after T20 World Cup win





NEW DELHI: The Board of Control for Cricket in India ( BCCI ) congratulated India cricket team after their victory in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 final against New Zealand national cricket team at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.India registered a commanding 96-run victory in the summit clash, lifting the trophy in front of a packed home crowd.The triumph marked a historic milestone as India successfully defended the ICC Men’s T20 World Cup title, becoming the first team in the tournament’s history to retain the trophy. The victory was also significant as India became the first nation to win the ICC Men’s T20 World Cup on home soil, making the occasion even more memorable for millions of fans.Under the leadership of captain Suryakumar Yadav, the Indian team showcased fearless and dynamic cricket throughout the competition. With explosive batting, disciplined bowling and exceptional fielding, the side remained consistent across all phases of the tournament and delivered when it mattered most.The BCCI also praised head coach Gautam Gambhir and the support staff for their leadership, planning and preparation, which helped build a confident and well-balanced team capable of performing under pressure.“The Board also commends the Men’s Selection Committee for identifying and backing a group of players who combined experience with youthful energy, resulting in a formidable squad that delivered on the biggest stage. The BCCI also thanks all its affiliated State Associations for their continued contribution in helping achieve this vision,” BCCI said in a statement.Congratulating the team, BCCI president Mithun Manhas said, “Winning the ICC Men’s T20 World Cup is a moment of immense pride for the entire nation. To defend the title and achieve this feat on home soil makes it even more special. The team played outstanding cricket throughout the tournament under the leadership of Suryakumar Yadav and the guidance of Head Coach Gautam Gambhir. I congratulate every member of the squad, the coaching staff and the selectors for this remarkable accomplishment. ”BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia said, “Indian cricket is currently in its golden phase. India hosted two major ICC events — the ICC Women’s World Cup last year and the ICC Men’s T20 World Cup — and to emerge champions in both is simply remarkable. This success is also a reflection of the strong foundations laid over the years through progressive planning and vision. The contributions of Mr Jay Shah during his tenure in strengthening Indian cricket’s structures and global standing have played a significant role in shaping this era of excellence. Kudos to Captain Suryakumar Yadav and his fearless group, the team management led by Gautam Gambhir and the selectors for building a balanced side capable of excelling on the world stage yet again."BCCI vice-president Rajeev Shukla added, “This victory is the result of collective effort, meticulous preparation and the commitment shown by the players and support staff throughout the tournament. The team has displayed remarkable composure and confidence in high-pressure situations, a hallmark of champion sides. To win the ICC Men’s T20 World Cup in front of our home fans makes the moment even more special and memorable. I would like to acknowledge the efforts of ICC Chair Mr Jay Shah, whose strong leadership continues to strengthen the global growth of the game. We thank the ICC for organising such a wonderful tournament that showcased the very best of T20 cricket. This triumph will remain a historic milestone for Indian cricket and a source of immense pride for the entire nation.”
Article Summary: India registered a commanding 96-run victory in the summit clash, lifting the trophy in front of a packed home crowd. The triumph marked a historic milestone as India successfully defended the ICC Men’s T20 World Cup title. The victory was also significant as India became the first nation to win the ICC men's T20 world cup on home soil.

Article Title: Sri Lanka call off Afghanistan series in UAE due to Middle East conflict
Article Text:
AP Photo

Yash Dhull Exclusive: Heart surgery, recovery and senior World Cup dream





Sri Lanka national cricket team have indefinitely postponed their upcoming white-ball series against Afghanistan national cricket team, which was scheduled to begin in the United Arab Emirates this week, an official confirmed on Monday."We had to cancel because of the flight situation... and the ongoing fighting in the region," a Sri Lanka Cricket official told AFP.The two teams were scheduled to play three T20 internationals in Sharjah on March 13, 15 and 17, followed by three One-Day Internationals in Dubai on March 20, 22 and 25.The tour would have marked the first time Afghanistan hosted Sri Lanka for a bilateral series.Tensions have escalated across the Middle East after the United States and Israel attacked Iran on February 28, prompting Tehran to launch retaliatory strikes.The conflict has disrupted flights across the region, including in Dubai, where the airport was briefly shut on Saturday as Iran fired drones and missiles at targets across the Gulf.War-torn Afghanistan has never hosted an international cricket match and has instead staged its home fixtures in India or the United Arab Emirates.
Article Summary: Sri Lanka national cricket team have indefinitely postponed their upcoming white-ball series against Afghanistan. The two teams were scheduled to play three T20 internationals in Sharjah on March 13, 15 and 17. The tour would have marked the first time Afghanistan hosted Sri Lanka for a bilateral series.

Article Title: Iraq Coach asks FIFA to postpone World Cup layoff amid Iran war
Article Text:
Players of Iraq Football Team (Getty Images)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph





Iraq’s football coach, Graham Arnold, has asked FIFA to postpone Iraq’s intercontinental playoff match for the World Cup.Many of Iraq’s players and team staff cannot travel right now because of the growing war involving Iran. Because of the situation, Iraq’s airspace is closed until April 1, so the team cannot gather together or fly to the match.Iraq is supposed to play a playoff game on March 31 in Monterrey for a palce in the World Cup. Their opponent will be either Suriname or Bolivia.Since the team cannot travel or prepare properly, the coach has asked FIFA to postpone the match so the players can safely meet and play later."If the game goes ahead in Mexico we have the difficulties of getting out of Baghdad," Arnold, an Australian, told CNN."About 60% of my players play in Iraq, all my backroom staff live in Iraq, all my medical staff live in Qatar and we're having trouble getting Mexican visas at this moment," he added.Arnold said he had already been forced to cancel a training camp in the United States."That has all been scrapped now, because we can't get out of Baghdad," he said."FIFA need to obviously make a quick decision on this because it is a bit unfair at this moment, with what we would have to go through."He suggested that Suriname and Bolivia could go ahead with their playoff in Monterrey on March 26 and the winner of that game could play Iraq in the United States just before the World Cup, which kicks off on June 11."Suriname could always play Bolivia if we can't get there, and we could always play the winner just before the World Cup and (that) lets us prepare properly and do everything required to be successful," Arnold said."Bolivia and Suriname can play in March, they've got no complications with flights or anything, they can get there straight away and we could play the winner"The winner stays and plays the World Cup and the loser goes home."Arnold said the Iraqi football authorities were in close contact with FIFA, but he admitted the situation was taking its toll."It's one step at a time, it's stressful, (I've had) a lot of sleepless nights worrying about getting that planning right," he said.An Iraqi source told AFP the national federation had asked for the change."Iraq's request came due to the inability of the delegation to travel from the capital Baghdad," they said."As a result of the closure of airspace and the security risks currently affecting the region," they added.
Article Summary: Iraq is supposed to play a playoff game on March 31 in Monterrey for a palce in the World Cup. Their opponent will be either Suriname or Bolivia. Iraq’s airspace is closed until April 1, so the team cannot gather together or fly to the match.

Article Title: Iran sing national anthem before bowing out of Women's Asian Cup
Article Text:
Iran players react during their national anthem ahead of the Women's Asian Cup soccer match between Iran and the Philippines in Robina, Australia, Sunday, March 8, 2026. (AP)

Exclusive: Aymeric Laporte previews Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona | La Liga

GOLD COAST: Iran's players sang the national anthem and saluted before bowing out of the Women's Asian Cup with defeat in their last group match on Sunday in Australia.When Iran faced South Korea on Monday in their opening game the players stood motionless, two days after the US and Israel began a war against the country.But on Thursday in their second game, against hosts Australia, all the Iranian players saluted and sang the anthem on the Gold Coast.Against the Philippines on Sunday they again sang and saluted as the rain came down on Queensland's Gold Coast.They went on to lose the encounter 2-0, ending their hopes of reaching the next round.No public reason was given for the players' original stance over the pre-game national anthem.Coach Marziyeh Jafari has said her team have "so much concern" about their families as the conflict raged and that players felt "fully disconnected" from their loved ones.Speaking to national broadcaster ABC ahead of Sunday's game, Foreign Minister Penny Wong was asked about the prospect of the team going home."I want to say about the Iranian women's team that it has been really moving for Australians to see them in Australia," she said.Wong added that the sight of the Australian players swapping shirts with their Iranian opponents was "a very evocative moment"."It spoke to solidarity and the way in which sport can bring us together," she said."We know this regime has brutally oppressed many Iranian women," she added.Iran lost 3-0 to South Korea and 4-0 to Australia to finish bottom of Group A with nine goals conceded and none scored.
Article Summary: Iran's players stood motionless during the national anthem in their opening game against South Korea. But on Thursday in their second game, against hosts Australia, all the Iranian players saluted and sang the anthem. On Sunday they again sang and saluted as the rain came down on Queensland's Gold Coast. They went on to lose the encounter 2-0 and finish bottom of Group A.

Article Title: La Liga: Lamine Yamal and Nicolas Gonzalez shine as Barcelona and Atletico win
Article Text:
Lamine Yamal of FC Barcelona celebrates after scoring (Getty Images)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Poll Did you think Athletic Bilbao deserved to win the match against Barcelona? Yes, they played better No, Barcelona earned the win

Atletico edge Sociedad

Teenage star Lamine Yamal scored a brilliant goal to help FC Barcelona beat Athletic Bilbao 1-0 in La Liga on Saturday.The win allowed Barcelona to restore their four-point lead over Real Madrid, who had earlier beaten Celta Vigo on Friday.The match at San Mames Stadium was closely contested and had few clear chances. Barcelona coach Hansi Flick rotated his squad because the team will soon face Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League round of 16.Barcelona struggled in the first half and did not create many chances.Midfielder Pedri later praised Yamal’s talent."We're already seeing what Lamine can do -- he puts it right in the top corner and there's nothing the keeper can do," Barca midfielder Pedri told Movistar."He's very young and he's only going to get better."What he has to do is not settle, to keep going like this, keep working and enjoying himself out there on the pitch, because he gives us a lot."Athletic Bilbao had some opportunities before the break. Selton Sanchez ran through on goal but Barcelona goalkeeper Joan Garcia made a good stop. The home team also thought they had scored, but Inaki Williams was ruled offside.Both teams appealed for red cards in the second half after fouls involving Alejandro Rego, Dani Olmo, and Pau Cubarsi, but the referee only showed yellow cards.Barcelona finally found the breakthrough in the 68th minute. Substitute Pedri passed the ball to Yamal, who escaped the attention of defender Adama Boiro and curled a beautiful shot into the top corner. It was his 19th goal of the season in all competitions.The goal proved to be the decisive moment in a tight match, giving Barcelona all three points.Athletic defender Dani Vivian said his team felt unlucky, believing they played well but did not deserve to lose."It's a very bad feeling, I think we were better, we didn't deserve to lose," said Athletic defender Dani Vivian."Today was a tough day against the hardest team in the league, and we saw how (well) the team did, it's a shame we didn't get the win."Nicolas Gonzalez scored twice as Atletico Madrid defeated Real Sociedad, moving three points clear of fourth-placed Villarreal in La Liga.Both teams had already qualified for the Copa del Rey final earlier in the week, so this match served as a preview of their title clash in Seville in April.Atletico took the lead through Alexander Sorloth, who continued his good scoring form. However, Carlos Soler equalised for Real Sociedad before halftime.In the second half, substitute Antoine Griezmann helped Atletico regain the lead by setting up Gonzalez with a clever backheel pass. But Real Sociedad quickly responded, with Mikel Oyarzabal scoring from outside the penalty area.The winning goal came when Gonzalez jumped high to head in a cross from Matteo Ruggieri."It had been a while since I'd scored so it's good I could do it today in this stadium with these fans," Gonzalez told Movistar."We're showing in every game what we want and what we're capable of."Atletico coach Diego Simeone praised Gonzalez, who had struggled for form after an injury in December."I'm really happy for Nico... he got injured in December and hasn't been able to find his form since," said Simeone."I hope he keeps it up, because we need everything he has to offer."Real Sociedad coach Pellegrino Matarazzo admitted his team did not play their best but believes things could be different when the two sides meet again in the Copa del Rey final in six weeks."We hate to lose and the performance was not our best," said Matarazzo."There's six weeks (before the final) with different players on the pitch... things will be different."
Article Summary: FC Barcelona beat Athletic Bilbao 1-0 in La Liga on Saturday. Lamine Yamal scored the only goal of the match in the 68th minute. Nicolas Gonzalez scored twice as Atletico Madrid beat Real Sociedad. Atletico move three points clear of fourth-placed Villarreal in the table.

Article Title: FA Cup: Arsenal, Manchester City, Chelsea and Liverpool make quarterfinals
Article Text:
Arsenal (AP Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph

Premier League leaders Arsenal had to battle hard to reach the quarterfinals of the FA Cup, edging Mansfield Town 2-1 away in a close match.Mansfield, who had knocked out Burnley in the previous round, defended well early on. But Noni Madueke broke the deadlock after 40 minutes with a neat left-footed finish.The home side fought back after the break. Substitute Will Evans equalised in the 50th minute when he ran onto a loose ball and scored. Mansfield stayed competitive until substitute Eberechi Eze struck a powerful shot into the roof of the net to secure Arsenal’s victory.Meanwhile, Manchester City also moved into the last eight with a 3-1 comeback win away to Newcastle United.Harvey Barnes gave Newcastle the lead in the 18th minute. City responded when Savinho equalised before halftime. Omar Marmoush then scored twice in the second half — first from close range and later with a powerful strike from outside the penalty area — to seal the win.Chelsea had a difficult match against Championship side Wrexham, eventually winning 4-2 after extra time.Sam Smith put Wrexham ahead in the 18th minute, but Chelsea levelled just before halftime thanks to an own goal by goalkeeper Arthur Okonkwo.Callum Doyle restored Wrexham’s lead in the 79th minute, but Josh Acheampong quickly equalised.Wrexham’s hopes suffered a blow when George Dobson was sent off. In extra time, Alejandro Garnacho put Chelsea ahead, and Joao Pedro scored late to confirm the win.Earlier, Liverpool became the first team to reach the quarterfinals with a 3-1 victory away to Wolverhampton Wanderers. The result also helped Liverpool avenge a 2-1 league defeat at the same venue earlier in the week.
Article Summary: Arsenal beat Mansfield Town 2-1 to reach the quarterfinals of the FA Cup. Manchester City also moved into the last eight with a 3-1 comeback win away to Newcastle United. Chelsea had a difficult match against Championship side Wrexham, eventually winning 4-2 after extra time.

Article Title: 'We will take this game as a final' - Aymeric Laporte on Barcelona clash in La Liga
Article Text:
File photo of Athletic Bilbao defender Aymeric Laporte with Barcelona's Dani Olmo during a La Liga match. (AP)

New Delhi:

Exclusive: Aymeric Laporte previews Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona | La Liga

Excerpts:

Q.

Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona

is a big game. How has the preparation been like? What are some of the areas you're focussing on as a team?

Laporte:

Q. You will be starting in defence. Against a team like Barcelona, what is the biggest challenge - one on ones, defensive line, what is it?

Laporte:

File photo of fans of Athletic Club at Estadio de San Mames. (Getty Images)

Q. Coming to Athletic, things have been a bit up and down this year. What is the goal for the team overall?

Laporte:

Q. With the World Cup also coming later in the year. For you personally, is there any goal fitness-wise or game-wise that you are looking to improve or build on as a player?

Laporte:

WATCH: Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona will be LIVE at 1:30am IST on 8 March on FanCode.

Athletic Bilbao face a daunting challenge as they host La Liga leaders Barcelona at San Mames, with the Catalan giants narrowly ahead in the title race.While Barcelona are battling Real Madrid at the top, ninth-placed Athletic are chasing European places in a tightly packed mid-table. For Aymeric Laporte, who spoke exclusively to TimesofIndia.com, the clash represents both a tactical test and a statement opportunity for Ernesto Valverde’s side.The defender expects Athletic to spend long spells without the ball against Barcelona’s possession-heavy style but insists the team is preparing to treat the match “like a final”. Laporte also spoke about the Basque side's season objectives and his personal focus with Spain’s World Cup campaign looming.Barcelona is a big team. They play top gameplay, so they have a good style - possession ball, long time. We will have to run for sure, but I hope we will be preparing at San Mames to do something big.Yeah, it's always a big challenge against big teams like this.We try our best, I try my best also. I try to manage the line, the defensive line, the pitch.It's true that we are rotating, like we are playing different people nearly every single game. But yeah, we are trying to solve all the issues game by game and we will try to prepare this game as a final.The ambition is to go game-by-game. I think it's the most important thing for this season.I would like or love to say in that top-six. But right now we are not in the best position to talk about the first 6-7 of La Liga. Step by step, Barcelona first and after we will see if we can win many games. We will try our best to win as much as possible and try to find the places on top of the league.When you play for a team in La Liga and I have played for Spain for a few years, of course it is in my head. It is also why I've come back here to Spain. To play the big games during the season, to keep the rhythm, the highest level. First we have the Finalissima against Argentina and after we will think about the World Cup.
Article Summary: Athletic Bilbao host La Liga leaders Barcelona at San Mames on 8 March. Barcelona are narrowly ahead in the title race, with Real Madrid second. Laporte expects Athletic to spend long spells without the ball against Barcelona’s possession-heavy style.

Article Title: ISL: Jamie Maclaren nets four, Mohun Bagan hammer Odisha 5-1 at Salt Lake
Article Text:
Jamie Maclaren (PTI Photo/Swapan Mahapatra)

ISL Highlights: Mohun Bagan Super Giants vs Odisha FC

KOLKATA: Jamie Maclaren smashed four goals — including a first-half hat-trick — as Mohun Bagan SG hammered Odisha FC 5-1 at the Salt Lake Stadium on Friday to stay perfect in their ISL campaign.The in-form Maclaren started the demolition job for Sergio Lobera’s defending champions and league leaders against the Spanish coach’s former team with two quick goals in 14 and 24 minutes. Alberto Rodrigues then came up from his defence to make it 3-0 with a piledriver from 25 yards out in the 42nd minute.Although Rahim Ali reduced the margin for the visitors within a minute, cashing in on a rare miscommunication between Bagan defender Mehtab Singh and goalkeeper Vishal Kaith, Maclaren still had time enough to complete his hattrick in the first minute of the first-half injury time and kill the game as a contest.The Australian striker then completed the rout with his fourth goal in the 88th minute as Lobera’s marauding side made it four wins in as many matches to lead the standings.In doing so, Maclaren — who has now scored in all four matches — also moved to the top of the scoring chart in this truncated ISL with 7 goals.
Article Summary: Jamie Maclaren scores hat-trick as Mohun Bagan SG thrash Odisha FC 5-1. Australian striker moves to the top of the scoring chart in this truncated ISL. Sergio Lobera’s side make it four wins in as many matches to lead the standings.

Article Title: Federico Valverde's stoppage-time strike gives Real Madrid 2-1 win over Celta Vigo
Article Text:
Real Madrid's Federico Valverde. (AP Photo/Lalo R. Villar)

Hard-fought win

Federico Valverde's heavily deflected 95th-minute drive snatched injury-hit Real Madrid a 2-1 win at Celta Vigo in La Liga on Friday.The Uruguayan midfielder needed a stroke of fortune at the death to pull his team to within one point of leaders Barcelona, who visit Athletic Bilbao on Saturday.Aurelien Tchouameni opened the scoring for Los Blancos early on but Borja Iglesias soon pulled Celta level at their Balaidos stadium.Alvaro Arbeloa's Madrid, without injured striker Kylian Mbappe , had lost their previous two league games and are struggling to find consistent form.Valverde's shot, which flew into Celta's net after bouncing off former Barcelona defender Marcos Alonso, stopped his side going three consecutive La Liga matches without a win."There's a long way to go in La Liga, a lot of points left to play for... at this point it's almost like La Liga has not started yet," Arbeloa told reporters."Every game you're playing against a team that has their own objectives and each game will be a war."We came here with 10 players out so I think our win deserves a lot of credit."As well as French superstar Mbappe, the team's top goalscorer, Arbeloa was without several other players including Jude Bellingham, Rodrygo Goes and Eduardo Camavinga.Despite the victory, Madrid's form and their injury list does not inspire confidence ahead of next week's Champions League last 16 clash against Manchester City.Arbeloa started 18-year-old midfielder Thiago Pitarch for the first time and he offered a decent display even as his team failed to impress.Iglesias forced Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois into a solid low save with a drive from the edge of the box in the opening exchanges.Arbeloa's side started well and Vinicius Junior struck the post before Tchouameni put them ahead in the 11th minute.The French midfielder produced a fine finish from the edge of the box as Madrid worked a corner to him, his strike hitting the upright on its way in.Celta were not discouraged though and some poor defending from Trent Alexander-Arnold let them back in.The England international allowed Williot Swedberg to get in behind him and then lacked the agility to block off the Swede, who cut the ball across for Iglesias to finish.Courtois made a good save to keep Swedberg at bay before the break, as sixth-place Celta largely gave as good as they got.Madrid appealed for a penalty when Ferran Jutgla handled the ball in the box, but a VAR review showed there was a push on a Celta defender just before and no spot kick was awarded.Celta substitute Iago Aspas hit the post late on and it seemed like his team were destined for a point as the clock ticked down.However in the final minute of stoppage time Valverde's effort from the edge of the box hit Alonso and left Celta goalkeeper Ionut Radu wrong-footed."We hardly gave up any chances, and the shot at the end was well defended, so we're a bit annoyed (to lose)," Iglesias told Movistar.Arbeloa said he hoped Madrid's determination to claim the three points could be a platform to build from going forward."I know we can do a lot of things better, but with the personality and character we showed today, I hope that this is a turning point and from here everything goes a lot better," added Arbeloa.
Article Summary: Real Madrid beat Celta Vigo 2-1 in La Liga on Friday. Federico Valverde's 95th- minute goal gives Los Blancos victory. Aurelien Tchouameni opened the scoring for Madrid. Borja Iglesias equalized for sixth-place Celta.

Article Title: FA Cup: 17-year-old winger Rio Ngumoh impresses as Liverpool crush Wolves 3-1 to enter quarterfinals
Article Text:
Liverpool's Rio Ngumoha. (AP Photo/Dave Shopland)

Ngumoha stands out

Liverpool moved into the FA Cup quarter-finals with a 3-1 win against Wolves on Friday as the Reds avenged their painful Premier League loss at Molineux just 72 hours earlier.Arne Slot's side struck twice in quick succession in the second half through Andrew Robertson's long-range rocket and a predatory Mohamed Salah finish.Curtis Jones wrapped up a much-needed fifth-round victory for Liverpool after their embarrassing 2-1 defeat against the Premier League's bottom club three days earlier.Hwang Hee-chan's late reply was no consolation for Wolves.Branded "slow and predictable" by furious captain Virgil van Dijk following that calamity, Liverpool set the record straight on their return to the West Midlands.Despite spending £450 million ($599 million) on new signings in the close season, Liverpool have mounted a woeful title defence, leaving the FA Cup and the Champions League as their last chances for silverware.Languishing in sixth place in the Premier League -- 19 points behind leaders Arsenal -- Slot needs to deliver a trophy to ease the mounting pressure in his turbulent second season at Anfield.Liverpool remain in contention for a ninth FA Cup triumph, and a first since 2022, while they step up their Champions League challenge with a last 16 first leg trip to Galatasaray on Tuesday.Slot made four changes for the Wolves rematch, including three in defence as Jeremie Frimpong, Milos Kerkez and Ibrahima Konate were all dropped.Avoiding relegation remains unlikely for a team currently 12 points from safety, but as well as beating Liverpool, Wolves also recently drew with Premier League leaders Arsenal and defeated Aston Villa.Well aware of their impending fate, Wolves fans mocked Liverpool with chants of "2-1 to the Championship" in the first half.Liverpool's 17-year-old winger Rio Ngumoha nearly silenced the taunts with a low drive that forced a good save from Sam Johnstone.Ngumoha carried Liverpool's lone threat in the opening period, his goal-bound strike headed clear by Joao Gomes after an incisive raid.Despite Ngumoha's best efforts, it was another uninspired half from Liverpool in a season scarred by criticism of their prosaic approach.Slot's men finally conjured a rare moment of magic to break the deadlock in the 51st minute.Salah and Jones worked the ball to Robertson and he thundered a superb strike into the far corner from 20 yards.It was the Scotland left-back's second goal this season and his first since September.After scoring against Wolves on Tuesday, Salah was back on target to double the lead two minutes later.When Salah pounced on Robertson's cross with a close-range finish, the Egyptian's ninth goal this season was initially disallowed for offside before VAR overturned the decision.Adding to the good news for Slot, German playmaker Florian Wirtz came off the bench in the closing stages after missing three games with a back injury.Jones put the seal on Liverpool's fifth win in their last six matches, caressing his shot past Johnstone in the 74th minute.Liverpool switched off in stoppage time as Hwang ran onto Johnstone's long punt to slot past Alisson Becker.
Article Summary: Liverpool beat Wolves 3-1 in the FA Cup fifth round. Andrew Robertson, Mohamed Salah and Curtis Jones on target for Reds. Liverpool avenged 2-1 Premier League defeat at Molineux on Tuesday. Wolves fans mocked Liverpool with chants of "2-1 to the Championship" in first half.

Article Title: Nazi salute costs Real Madrid as UEFA slaps $17,000 fine after fan's gesture during Champions League game
Article Text:
Real Madrid's Vinicius Junior reacts during a Spanish La Liga football match between Real Madrid and Getafe in Madrid, Spain, Monday, March 2, 2026. (AP Photo)

UEFA has fined Spanish football club Real Madrid 15,000 euros ($17,000) after one of the club’s supporters made a Nazi salute before a recent UEFA Champions League match against Benfica. The governing body also imposed a partial stadium closure of 500 seats at the Santiago Bernabéu, suspended for one year.UEFA said the action was taken after an incident before the second leg of the play-off round between the two sides on February 25. The disciplinary board punished Madrid "for the racist and/or discriminatory behaviour of its supporters," according to a statement issued by the European football body.The incident took place before Real Madrid’s Champions League match against Benfica. The Spanish club later said the supporter involved had been identified and removed from the stadium."Real Madrid condemns this type of gesture and expression that incites violence and hatred in sports and society," the club said at the time.A week before the incident at the Bernabéu, Madrid forward Vinícius Júnior alleged that he was racially abused by Benfica player Gianluca Prestianni. Prestianni has denied the allegation.Real Madrid also removed the supporter who was caught on camera making the Nazi salute before the match began. The first leg of the tie had also seen the alleged racism incident involving Vinicius and Prestianni.Real Madrid advanced to the round of 16 of the Champions League, where they will face Manchester City.
Article Summary: UEFA has fined Spanish football club Real Madrid 15,000 euros ($17,000) after one of the club's supporters made a Nazi salute. The governing body also imposed a partial stadium closure of 500 seats at the Santiago Bernabéu, suspended for one year. The incident took place before Real Madrid’s Champions League match against Benfica.

Article Title: Chennaiyin FC to take on Kerala Blasters on Saturday
Article Text:
While Chennaiyin managed to salvage a point in their last outing against Odisha FC, the Blasters have endured a difficult start, losing all three of their opening matches.

ISL Highlights: Kerala Blasters FC vs Mumbai City FC

CHENNAI: Chennaiyin FC (CFC) will take on Kerala Blasters (KBFC) in the much-anticipated southern derby in Kochi on Saturday, with both teams still searching for their first win of the season. While Chennaiyin managed to salvage a point in their last outing against Odisha FC, the Blasters have endured a difficult start, losing all three of their opening matches. Ahead of the clash, CFC head coach Clifford Miranda said he expects more from both his foreign signings and senior Indian players as the team looks to turn performances into results.“We have 28 players, but foreigners do play a big part. That’s the truth because they bring quality, leadership, charisma and character.Not that Indian players don’t have these qualities, but foreign players help to further bolster the team,” Miranda said.“I expect more from our foreign players and also from some of the senior Indian players in the team. In terms of work rate and understanding the game, I demand more from everyone. When I pick the team, I don’t look at nationality or where a player comes from. I just choose the players who can give the best for the team on that particular day.”Chennaiyin have scored just once in their opening three matches despite creating opportunities. Miranda believes the issue lies in the final third.“It’s a combination of both decision-making and execution. The final phase is always the most difficult because you get very little time and space,” he said.“We are doing quite well in the first two phases of the game, but in the final phase we need more composure. We also need more players arriving in the penalty box. Possession is important, but in the end it’s goals that win matches.”Despite Kerala’s winless start, Miranda expects a stern challenge at the Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium.“If you look at their games, they have played well and were a little unlucky not to get something from those matches. Playing in Kochi is never easy for any team. It’s going to be a very difficult game,” he said.
Article Summary: Chennaiyin FC (CFC) will take on Kerala Blasters (KBFC) in the much-anticipated southern derby in Kochi on Saturday. Both teams are still searching for their first win of the season. While Chennaiyin managed to salvage a point in their last outing against Odisha FC, the Blasters have endured a difficult start, losing all three of their opening matches.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs could target $45M San Francisco 49ers star in massive offseason move
Article Text:
The San Francisco 49ers may consider trading a veteran Pro Bowl left tackle amid stalled contract talks. League insiders believe the Kansas City Chiefs could be the most eager suitor if a deal happens. The move would strengthen protection for Patrick Mahomes as Kansas City continues chasing another Super Bowl.

Chiefs reportedly viewed as strong fit for Trent Williams







The offseason rumor mill rarely sleeps in the NFL, and the latest buzz involves a potential blockbuster move between two of the league’s most recognizable franchises. Reports suggest the San Francisco 49ers may be willing to move on from star offensive tackle Trent Williams if ongoing contract discussions continue to stall. That possibility has immediately drawn attention across the league, especially from teams that believe one elite lineman could change their championship outlook.One franchise being closely linked to the situation is the Kansas City Chiefs. After several key roster decisions this offseason, the Chiefs appear determined to keep their championship window wide open around quarterback Patrick Mahomes. Adding a veteran protector like Williams would not only strengthen the offensive line but also send a clear signal that Kansas City is still chasing another Super Bowl run.The speculation began after insider Ian Rapoport revealed that tensions between Trent Williams and the 49ers organization have not yet produced a new contract agreement."The 49ers are now said to be open to trading Pro Bowl LT Trent Williams, sources say, if the situation doesn’t get resolved," Rapoport reported Monday. "A resolution has not been easy and Williams is frustrated with the process. He’s due $32M in salary with a $38M+ cap number."If San Francisco ultimately decides to move its veteran left tackle, Kansas City could emerge as a logical destination. According to league chatter reported by analyst Jason La Canfora, many around the NFL believe the Chiefs would be among the most aggressive teams pursuing Williams."Kansas City is seen by many around the league as the team most eager to land [Williams] and the one that would be the best fit," La Canfora reported.The idea makes sense when viewed through the lens of Kansas City’s current roster strategy. The team recently released offensive tackle Jawaan Taylor but still has young options such as Josh Simmons and Jaylon Moore expected to compete for starting roles. Even so, Williams remains one of the most dominant tackles in football despite being 37 years old.That experience could prove valuable for a team still built around Mahomes’ explosive offense. With veteran tight end Travis Kelce returning for another season, Kansas City appears determined to remain firmly in the Super Bowl conversation rather than entering a rebuilding phase.Of course, any trade would require significant compensation. The 49ers would likely seek a mix of draft capital and possibly a player who could step into their offensive line immediately.For now, the situation remains unresolved. But if negotiations between Williams and San Francisco continue to drag on, the Kansas City Chiefs may find themselves in position to pull off one of the most intriguing trades of the offseason.
Article Summary: Reports suggest the San Francisco 49ers may be willing to move on from star offensive tackle Trent Williams. League insiders believe the Kansas City Chiefs could be the most eager suitor if a deal happens. The move would strengthen protection for Patrick Mahomes as Kansas City continues chasing another Super Bowl.

Article Title: “She’s got enough money”: Patrick Mahomes’ dad stirs controversy with comment about Taylor Swift at Chiefs games
Article Text:
Pat Mahomes Sr. sparked discussion after commenting on the possibility of sharing a suite with Taylor Swift at a Kansas City Chiefs playoff game. Speaking on radio, he noted players usually have separate spaces and joked Swift could easily get her own suite while attending games with Travis Kelce.

Patrick Mahomes’ father addresses suite seating with Taylor Swift





The relationship between pop superstar Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce has dominated headlines since the couple went public. Their appearances at NFL games quickly turned stadium suites into celebrity hotspots, drawing cameras, fan reactions, and endless commentary. But not everyone involved in the league’s inner circles seems eager to share the spotlight that follows the global music icon.That conversation resurfaced after comments from Pat Mahomes Sr. gained attention among NFL fans. The father of Patrick Mahomes spoke candidly about the possibility of sitting near Swift during a high profile playoff game. His remarks offered a glimpse into how the sudden crossover between pop culture and professional football has changed the atmosphere around Chiefs games.The moment came during a January 2024 interview on WFAN Sports Radio’s “Evan & Tiki.” While discussing the growing buzz surrounding Taylor Swift’s appearances at Chiefs games, Pat Mahomes Sr. explained that players and their families often maintain their own private spaces during major matchups.“Travis normally has his own thing and Patrick has his own deal too,” Pat said during an January 2024 interview on WFAN Sports Radio’s “Evan & Tiki.”“I imagine if Taylor wants her own suite, she’s got enough money to get whichever one she wants.”The comment arrived as fans speculated about the seating arrangements during the AFC Championship game between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Baltimore Ravens. Swift’s presence at several Chiefs games had already transformed the stands into a celebrity spectacle, with cameras frequently cutting to the suite where she watched Kelce play.Mahomes Sr. had firsthand experience with the attention surrounding those luxury boxes. During a previous Chiefs matchup against the Buffalo Bills, he sat a few suites away from Swift and Kelce’s brother, Jason Kelce. That game went viral after Jason Kelce celebrated enthusiastically with fans in the freezing weather, even removing his shirt and joining the crowd in the stands.Moments like that helped turn the Chiefs’ playoff run into a cultural event that extended far beyond football. Swift’s appearances brought new audiences to NFL broadcasts and fueled social media discussion every week.Still, Pat Mahomes Sr.’s comments highlight the balancing act inside the stadium. For players and their families, game day remains focused on football. For millions watching at home, it has also become a blend of sports, celebrity culture, and viral moments that keep the spotlight firmly fixed on Kansas City.
Article Summary: Pat Mahomes Sr. joked that Taylor Swift could easily get her own suite while attending games with Travis Kelce. He said players and their families often maintain their own private spaces during major matchups. The comment came as fans speculated about the seating arrangements during the AFC Championship game between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Baltimore Ravens.

Article Title: “Changed my life forever”: Justin Herbert melts hearts with emotional message for Madison Beer
Article Text:
Justin Herbert gave fans a rare look at his relationship with Madison Beer through heartfelt messages and candid photos shared online. Calling her his “favorite person of all time,” Herbert said the singer has “changed my life forever.” The couple first sparked dating rumors in 2025 and recently made their romance public after appearing together at high-profile events.

Justin Herbert shares heartfelt message for Madison Beer





People are often interested in romance between sports and music stars, but the relationship between Justin Herbert and pop singer Madison Beer has gotten a lot of attention lately. This week, the NFL quarterback gave fans a rare look into their private lives while celebrating Beer’s 27th birthday. He posted heartfelt messages and honest photos that quickly went viral on social media.Herbert's tribute stood out not only because it was so sweet, but also because the couple usually doesn't talk about their relationship very much. Since the middle of 2025, the two have been linked, but they only recently made their relationship public. The birthday posts revealed affectionate moments that fans had rarely seen before, adding another chapter to one of the most talked-about celebrity sports relationships in recent months.The birthday celebration unfolded through a series of Instagram Stories posted by Herbert. One of the most touching moments featured a black-and-white photo of Beer leaning in to kiss him on the sidelines before a game involving the Los Angeles Chargers. Over the image, Herbert shared a message that reflected how meaningful the relationship has become in his life."Happy birthday to my favorite person of all time," Herbert wrote over a black-and-white photo of Beer giving him a kiss on the sidelines before a Chargers game."I love you so much. You've changed my life forever 🤍."The tribute did not stop there. Herbert followed it with another photo from a night out together, where the two appeared relaxed and happy. Alongside the image, he added a simple but revealing caption that captured the mood of the celebration. "I am the luckiest guy alive..."Other images added a playful touch. One picture showed Beer posing in front of a stand labeled “Beers of the World,” a moment that appeared to amuse the quarterback. Another snapshot captured her reaching out to pet a group of goats, which Herbert jokingly captioned: "My goats."The birthday posts arrived only weeks after the couple made their relationship official in the public eye. They appeared together at the Clive Davis pre-Grammys gala in January, marking their first major public outing as a couple. Beer initially walked the red carpet alone before meeting Herbert inside the event, where photographers captured the pair smiling and posing together.Their romance first drew attention in August when the two were spotted together during a photoshoot in Los Angeles. A few weeks later, they were photographed walking together in the city. By October, the connection became even clearer when Beer was seen kissing Herbert on the sidelines during a Chargers game.Since then, the couple’s relationship has gradually moved into the spotlight. For fans of both football and pop music, Herbert’s birthday tribute offered a rare and heartfelt look into a romance that continues to grow.
Article Summary: Justin Herbert and Madison Beer first sparked dating rumors in 2025. This week, the NFL quarterback gave fans a rare look into their private lives while celebrating Beer’s 27th birthday. He posted heartfelt messages and honest photos that quickly went viral on social media.

Online speculation about possible cheating quickly spread, though none of those claims have been confirmed by credible sources.

Dak Prescott faces cheating speculation after sudden breakup with fiancée





A wave of online speculation has erupted around Dak Prescott after reports surfaced that he and his fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos have called off their wedding just weeks before the planned ceremony. The couple, who share two young daughters, had reportedly been preparing for a destination celebration in Italy later this year. Instead, recent developments suggest their relationship reached a breaking point during what was supposed to be a celebratory getaway.New reports and chatter on social media say that the breakup happened during bachelor and bachelorette parties in the Bahamas. What started out as a fun trip quickly turned tense, with insiders saying that a heated argument made Ramos think about the relationship's future. Only thing I can think of."Despite the viral attention, none of those claims have been confirmed. There is currently no verified evidence suggesting cheating played a role in the breakup. Ending a long term relationship is never simple, especially under the constant spotlight that surrounds one of the NFL ’s most recognizable quarterbacks.

Article Title: “Diggs don't value her one-bit”: Did Cardi B reject Stefon Diggs and tell him to fix things with the mothers of his other children?
Article Text:
A viral social media post claimed Stefon Diggs asked Cardi B for forgiveness after their breakup. However, there is no verified evidence supporting the claim. Neither Diggs nor Cardi B has confirmed the story, and no credible reports back the rumor, suggesting the dramatic narrative circulating online is likely misinformation.

Did Stefon Diggs contact Cardi B to fix their relationship?





This week, rumors spread widely on social media that Stefon Diggs and rapper Cardi B were trying to get back together. This was sparked by a viral post that said the NFL star had reached out to his ex-girlfriend to ask for forgiveness. The post quickly became popular online, getting attention from fans of both sports and music. But there is no proof that the claims made in the viral message are true.Despite the growing buzz, the story appears to be based entirely on speculation rather than confirmed reporting. There has been no public response from either Diggs or Cardi B to the claims, and no reliable source has said that they talked about them.The rumor originated from a social media post that described an alleged interaction between the two public figures. The post read:"Stefon Diggs reportedly reached out to Cardi B to ask for forgiveness for everything he has done to her, but Cardi B told him - SHE IS DONE!Stefon Diggs wanted to fix things with her - after being dropped by the Patriots, and after realizing that - his life has not been the same since they broke up.However, Cardi B told him that - she's done for GOOD, and that she is in her era of peace. She said no man can give her the type of peace she deserves right now, except herself.Cardi has told Diggs to fix things with his other baby mamas, not her. According to her, Diggs don't value her one-bit.Cardi B told him - they can only do co-parenting for the sake of their child, and nothing else.Cardi B is in her feminist era.👏"While the dramatic message quickly went viral, there are several issues with its credibility.There is no confirmed record of Diggs being released by the New England Patriots in connection with the timeline mentioned in the post.In addition, there is no reliable reporting suggesting the two celebrities share a child or have recently been involved in co parenting discussions.Experts who track online misinformation note that celebrity relationships are frequent targets of fabricated stories because they generate strong reactions and easy engagement.One unproven claim can go viral before people take the time to check if it's true.For now, the viral story seems to be just another case of people making guesses on social media instead of a real event. The claims going around online are not true until either Diggs or Cardi B directly addresses the issue. Be careful with them.
Article Summary: A viral social media post claimed Stefon Diggs asked Cardi B for forgiveness after their breakup. However, there is no verified evidence supporting the claim. Neither Diggs norCardi B has confirmed the story. No credible reports back the rumor, suggesting the dramatic narrative circulating online is likely misinformation.

Aaron Rodgers’ ex Danica Patrick on dating him for over two years amid his controversial remarks.(Image via Getty Images)

Dak Prescott’s fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos reportedly hired attorneys to challenge his prenup.(Image via Getty Images)

What allegedly happened between Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos?

The source added, “The prenup wasn’t very strict…Everyone basically kept whatever they had before the marriage. It was pretty straightforward.”But Dak Prescott’s fiancée, Sarah Jane Ramos, hired her own attorneys and reportedly did not agree to the prenup that was proposed.As per Media Take Out, the mother of two reportedly “wanted additional security beyond the standard arrangement.”Apparently, Sarah Jane Ramos has reportedly claimed that she has been with the Dallas Cowboys’ star player even before he signed an expensive contract with the team and so, “deserved” more “security”.As the two engaged in a nasty disagreement over prenuptial agreements through their attorneys, the two decided to part ways and end their three year long relationship.However, just a few hours ago, Sarah Jane Ramos denied that the two ended their engagement over any disagreement over an alleged prenup. But the Dallas Cowboys' star player, Dak Prescott, has remained silent and stayed away from the drama.For the unversed, Sarah Jane Ramos and Dak Prescott have been dating for close to three years and are already parents to two young daughters.The high profile couple got engaged in 2024, jus months before they announced that they were expecting a second child.As per reports, both Dak Prescott and Sarah Jane Ramos were in Bahamas as they celebrated their joint bachelor and bachelorette parties with their own set of friends.As per insiders, a nasty argument broke out between the two and Sarah Jane Ramos called off their Italian wedding, which was all set to be held on 10th April.An email to all their guests have been sent about the two cancelling their wedding as they will continue to co-parent their two young daughters.
Article Summary: Dak Prescott's fiancée Sarah Jane Ramos reportedly hired attorneys to challenge his prenup. As per insiders, a nasty argument broke out and the two called off their Italian wedding, which was all set to be held on 10th April. The two have been dating for close to three years and are already parents to two young daughters.

Article Title: Rashee Rice: Rashee Rice makes cryptic post about Trent McDuffie’s historic deal as suspension rumors swirl around Chiefs star
Article Text:
Rashee Rice makes cryptic post about Trent McDuffie’s historic deal as suspension rumors swirl around Chiefs star.(Image via Jamie Squire/Getty Images)

Rashee Rice makes a controversial post amid his uncertain future with the Kansas City Chiefs

Will Rashee Rice be suspended by the Kansas City Chiefs?







Rashee Rice, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, has been in the news about his uncertain future with the team ever since his ex girlfriend and mother of his children, Dacoda Jones, accused him of brutal domestic violence.While the Kansas City Chiefs are yet to make a decision on Rashee Rice’s future in the league, the star player drops a cryptic hint as his former teammate, Trent McDuffie, makes history.A few hours ago, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Rashee Rice, took to his Instagram story to share a post about Trent McDuffie signing a record breaking deal with the Los Angeles Rams.For the unversed, Trent McDuffie is the highest paid cornerback in the history of NFL after the Los Angeles Rams signed him to a record four year, $124 million extension on Sunday.While Rashee Rice did not add any words to the post, it seems a controversial post considering his situation with the Kansas City Chiefs.Though the team has stayed away from making any statements about Rashee Rice’s future, NFL insiders have hinted that he might be “suspended for more than 6 games”.A few days ago, at the NFL Combine, popular NFL insider Dan Graziano spoke about the Rashee Rice’s situation with the Kansas City Chiefs as he said, “If you’re the Chiefs, it’s very difficult to talk about these things. You never want to say, obviously, the wrong thing and be disrespectful…”The popular NFL insider added, “So now, if you’re the Chiefs, it’s not about a value judgment on how he behaves off the field. It’s more about, is this guy going to be consistently available to us? And if he’s not, how do we commit money to that?”Similarly, NFL insider Nate Taylor has predicted that Rashee Rice’s next suspension could last between “10 to 12 games”, considering this is the second high profile controversy he is involved in, after his multi vehicular crash in 2024 which resulted in being suspended in 6 games.However, neither Rashee Rice nor the Kansas City Chiefs has confirmed any speculations yet.For now, Rashee Rice seems to be focused on fighting the civil lawsuit filed by his ex girlfriend, Dacoda Jones, where she sued him for a whopping $1 million.Though Rashee Rice has denied all charges against him, the domestic violence accusations have sparked outrage.
Article Summary: Rashee Rice, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, has been in the news about his uncertain future with the team ever since his ex girlfriend and mother of his children, Dacoda Jones, accused him of brutal domestic violence. NFL insiders have hinted that he might be “suspended for more than 6 games”, considering this is the second high profile controversy he is involved in.

Article Title: Fact check: Did Joe Burrow really end his relationship with model Olivia Ponton to pursue Jessica Alba?
Article Text:
Did Joe Burrow really end his relationship with model Olivia Ponton to pursue Jessica Alba?(Image via Getty Images)

Has Joe Burrow started a relationship with Jessica Alba after dumping Olivia Ponton?

Olivia Ponton has remained silent amid Joe Burrow’s romance rumors with Jessica Alba





Joe Burrow, the Cincinnati Bengals’ star player, was rumored to be in a pretty long term relationship with popular social media influencer and model, Olivia Ponton.Though the two have been strictly private about their romance, things have taken a turn when the popular quarterback, Joe Burrow, was spotted with popular Hollywood actress and entrepreneur, Jessica Alba, in Las Vegas. This has sparked panic among fans.A few hours ago, Joe Burrow was spotted laughing as he was seated alongside Jessica Alba in a casino in Las Vegas.As Olivia Ponton seemed missing from pictures, fans were convinced that Joe Burrow has ended things with her and is now in a high profile relationship with popular Hollywood actress and entrepreneur, Jessica Alba.However, the rumor is entirely false as Jessica Alba is in a pretty long term relationship with her boyfriend, Danny Ramirez.Just hours after Joe Burrow and Jessica Alba romance rumors sparked panic among fans, Danny Ramirez shut down the drama as he posted several romantic pictures from their trip to Mexico.The caption on Danny Ramirez’s post read as, "Mexico mágico", as Jessica Alba’s reply to it was, "My heart".As per TMZ Sports, Joe Burrow and Jessica Alba were with their group of friends in Las Vegas when the two were photographed and sparked romance rumors.However, neither Jessica Alba nor the Cincinnati Bengals’ star player, Joe Burrow, has responded to fans rooting for the two.While Joe Burrow is one of the most popular athletes in the world, the popular quarterback prefers to maintain a pretty private life.Before his house was burglarised in the end of 2024, there were no reports of Joe Burrow’s dating life.It was only when Olivia Ponton reported the incident to authorities, Joe Burrow was linked to her.However, the Cincinnati Bengals’ star player was not happy about his personal life being discussed in public as he even slammed the media for it.While the two still have managed to keep things private, Joe Burrow and Olivia Ponton have been spotted out and about at music festivals and on date nights.At this point in time, the popular social media influencer and model, Olivia Ponton, has stayed away from commenting on Joe Burrow’s romance rumors with Hollywood actress, Jessica Alba.
Article Summary: Joe Burrow, the Cincinnati Bengals’ star player, was rumored to be in a relationship with popular social media influencer and model, Olivia Ponton. A few hours ago, Joe Burrow was spotted laughing as he was seated alongside Jessica Alba in a casino in Las Vegas. This has sparked panic among fans who are convinced that Burrow has ended his relationship with Ponton to pursue Alba. However, Alba is in a long term relationship with her boyfriend, Danny Ramirez.

Article Title: What’s going on with Dwight and Amber Howard? NBA legend’s estranged wife files for divorce after massive accusation
Article Text:
Dwight Howard and Amber Howard. Image via: Jerritt Clark/Getty Images for Elevate Agency

Dwight and Amber Howard's relationship rift following a massive accusation, explained



Dwight Howard and Amber Howard. Image via: Getty Images

Dwight Howard's son breaks silence on allegations against his father







Trouble inside the home of former Dwight Howard has spilled into the public eye after a dramatic legal move from both sides of his marriage. Court filings show that the longtime NBA star and his estranged wife, Amber Howard, each filed for divorce on the same day, signaling a new chapter in a relationship that has already faced earlier attempts at separation.The filings arrived during a turbulent period for the couple. Reports indicate that local authorities had visited the pair’s Georgia residence multiple times in recent weeks. At the same time, emotional videos and serious allegations circulating online intensified attention around the former NBA champion’s personal life. As details emerged, members of Howard’s family also began speaking publicly.Legal documents show that Dwight Howard submitted his divorce filing first, stating that the marriage was “irretrievably broken.” The paperwork also requested exclusive use of the couple’s Georgia mansion. Soon after, Amber Howard arrived at court with her attorney to file her own divorce petition.Despite the competing filings, the couple remains under the same roof at their marital home in Georgia for now. The situation marks the second time their marriage has reached this point. Amber filed for divorce in 2025 before the pair reconciled and withdrew the case.This time, the conflict escalated after a series of accusations surfaced online. In emotional social media videos, Amber described intense struggles inside the household and claimed authorities had visited their residence several times.“To know me, you know I’m prideful and private. My marriage has put me in a really dangerous spot. CPS just took my stepdaughter because of her father.”She also spoke about her attempts to repair the marriage through counseling.“I tried to get so much help. I asked for counseling in our marriage. We went through two different counselors. I keep telling people he needs some help.”In the same video, she explained why she had previously stayed in the relationship despite her fears.“I stood by my husband, even though I was scared for myself. Whatever he wanted me to say, whatever it was, because this is my husband.”Amber further alleged that the environment inside the home had become overwhelming.“I’ve been with this man for 14 months. I can’t ruin my whole life for something he’s doing.”Howard’s eldest son, Braylon Howard, addressed the situation in a video circulating on social media. Braylon, whose mother is television personality Royce Reed, spoke in a reflective tone while discussing tensions within the family.“Oh man, dang. But my mama crazy, my side of the family crazy, I’m crazy, my sister crazy, my brother crazy, you feel me? But hey, you know what I’m saying?”He continued by suggesting that people sometimes learn to cope with difficult family dynamics as they grow older.“I hope you getting the help you need. But I told y’all, man, my mama did too, especially. But it gets to a point where you just gotta learn to deal with certain things as you get older, bro. But hey, man, that’s all right there. I will never do, but you got it, bro. I’ve been known.”Meanwhile, Dwight Howard has not issued a public response to the allegations as the divorce proceedings begin to move through the court system.
Article Summary: Dwight Howard and his estranged wife, Amber Howard, each filed for divorce on the same day. Reports indicate that local authorities had visited the pair’s Georgia residence multiple times in recent weeks. The situation marks the second time their marriage has reached this point.

Article Title: Magic City controversy: Luke Kornet's plea to end Atlanta Hawks' strip club plans ends after long debate
Article Text:
Luke Kornet. Image via: Daniel Dunn-Imagn Images

NBA cancels Atlanta Hawks' Magic City Night promotion



Spurs' Luke Kornet sparked the debate over the strip club promotion







The NBA has shut down the Atlanta Hawks’ planned “Magic City Night,” bringing an abrupt end to a promotion that had stirred debate across the basketball world. The theme night, tied to the well-known Magic City venue in Atlanta, was scheduled for March 16 during the Hawks’ home game against the Orlando Magic.The franchise had framed the event as a celebration of Atlanta culture. Plans included food inspired by the club’s famous lemon pepper wings, music performances, merchandise, and a special podcast recording. The concept quickly divided opinion across the league. By Monday, league leadership stepped in, ending the promotion after hearing concerns from players, employees, partners, and fans.The league confirmed that the planned in-arena promotion would not take place. Commissioner Adam Silver explained that the NBA examined the situation after learning about the event and speaking with Hawks leadership.“When we became aware of the Atlanta Hawks' scheduled promotion, we reached out to Hawks leadership to better understand their plans and rationale,” Silver said. “While we appreciate the team's perspective and their desire to move forward, we have heard significant concerns from a broad array of league stakeholders, including fans, partners and employees.I believe cancelling this promotion is the right decision for the broader NBA community. ”The Hawks acknowledged the decision shortly after the announcement."While we are very disappointed in the NBA's decision to cancel our Magic City Night promotion, we fully respect its decision," the Hawks said Monday."As a franchise, we remain committed to celebrating the best of Atlanta, with authenticity, in ways that continue to unite and bring us all together."A halftime performance from Atlanta rapper T.I. is still scheduled, and certain food items tied to the theme may still appear. Other plans, including special merchandise sales and a live podcast discussion involving Hawks owner Jami Gertz and Magic City founder Michael Barney, have been canceled.While the league cited widespread concern, the major spark in the debate came from Luke Kornet of the San Antonio Spurs. The veteran center publicly criticized the idea of celebrating a strip club during an NBA game, arguing that the message conflicted with the league’s values.Kornet wrote that the league should prioritize respect for the many women who work throughout the NBA organization and its teams."The NBA should desire to protect and esteem women, many of whom work diligently every day to make this the best basketball league in the world. We should promote an atmosphere that is protective and respectful of the daughters, wives, sisters, mothers, and partners that we know and love."Former Hawks big man Al Horford voiced support for Kornet’s stance, which helped push the discussion into a wider league conversation.
Article Summary: NBA cancels Atlanta Hawks' Magic City Night promotion. San Antonio Spurs' Luke Kornet sparked the debate over the strip club promotion. Plans included food inspired by the club’s famous lemon pepper wings, music performances, merchandise, and a special podcast recording.

Article Title: LeBron James shares a proud dad moment after Bronny James’ powerful poster dunk against the Santa Cruz Warriors goes viral
Article Text:
LeBron James and Bronny James (Image via: William Liang/ AP)

NBA icon LeBron James beams with pride after Bronny James’ terrific performance against the Santa Cruz Warriors

LeBron James' Instagram story





Despite scaling heights during his 23rd NBA year, LeBron James has always been there for his kids and wife, Savannah. Recently, the Los Angeles Lakers’ cornerstone shared a proud dad moment on his Instagram handle with respect to his older son, Bronny James, who is currently playing for G-League affiliate South Bay Lakers. After playing a few games in the 2025-26 NBA season alongside his legendary dad, LeBron James, Bronny is currently displaying his sheer athletic prowess with the South Bay Lakers.During a recent game against the Santa Cruz Warriors, Bronny James proved he is gradually moving on his iconic dad’s footsteps. The terrific shot by the junior, James, even proved that apart from having great athletic prowess, he has a great hunger and zeal to show up his best in every game.LeBron James’ son Bronny James sent waves across the NBA league with his great performance with the G-League affiliate South Bay Lakers. The talented guard started with 15 points, two assists, and one rebound with half an hour into the game against the Santa Cruz Warriors. The moment that diverted the heads of the NBA analyst and critics was when Bronny James went on to make a terrific poster dunk during the second quarter.With an overall score of 113-104, the South Bay Lakers dominated the Warriors at Kaiser Permanente Arena.Los Angeles Lakers’ legend LeBron James could not hide his excitement and went on to share a proud dad moment on Instagram. According to his Instagram story, the NBA star posted Bronny James' poster dunk moment while decimating the Santa Cruz Warriors. James’ impactful contribution spoke volumes about his potential during the South Bay Lakers game. The 6-foot-2 guard has already carved a spot for himself in the G-League affiliate Lakers’ franchise.According to the NBA rumor mill, after losing three consecutive games in the ongoing season, the Los Angeles Lakers were looking forward to making a major roster shuffle, which included the possible addition of Bronny James. As the Lakers’ roster is already plagued with injuries, there has been a strong possibility that, apart from LeBron James’ son Bronny, a few other players from the South Bay Lakers were also considered for a major career shift.
Article Summary: LeBron James' son, Bronny James, is currently playing for the South Bay Lakers. The 6-foot-2 guard has already carved a spot for himself in the G-League affiliate Lakers’ franchise. LeBron James could not hide his excitement and shared a proud dad moment on Instagram.
